meta.title: Runway Gen-4.5 AI Video Generator | Next-Gen Motion Quality | OpenCreator
meta.description: Explore Runway Gen-4.5 for higher motion fidelity and better prompt adherence. Join the waitlist on OpenCreator.

hero.tagline: Next-gen video generation with stronger motion
hero.description: Gen-4.5 focuses on improved motion quality, prompt adherence, and creative control for cinematic video generation. OpenCreator will provide access as soon as it’s available.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Designed for creators who need reliable motion and control

motion.title: Improved motion quality
motion.description: More stable, coherent movement and fewer temporal artifacts.

adherence.title: Better prompt adherence
adherence.description: More reliable following of scene instructions and composition constraints.

camera.title: Camera intent
camera.description: More predictable camera motion and shot structure across generations.

realism.title: More believable scenes
realism.description: Better visual plausibility for common real-world situations.

consistency.title: Higher temporal consistency
consistency.description: Less flicker, fewer sudden changes, and more stable object presence.

workflow.title: Iteration-friendly
workflow.description: Fast experimentation for concepting, ads, and storyboarding.

gallery.title: See It In Action
gallery.subtitle: Representative OpenCreator workflows similar to Gen-4.5 use cases

action.title: Action scenes
action.useCase: Generate stable high-motion shots with coherent camera movement.

product.title: Product videos
product.useCase: Turn product visuals into dynamic clips for ads and landing pages.

story.title: Short narratives
story.useCase: Create consistent, cinematic clips for story beats and concept trailers.

comparison.title: Model Comparison
comparison.subtitle: Positioning vs other popular video models

pricing.title: Coming Soon
pricing.subtitle: Gen-4.5 will be available on OpenCreator soon
pricing.note: Pricing and availability will be updated once Gen-4.5 is integrated into OpenCreator.

0.question: Is Gen-4.5 available on OpenCreator?
0.answer: Not yet. This is a pre-launch landing page.

1.question: What should I do while waiting?
1.answer: Build and validate your workflows using existing video models, then swap when Gen-4.5 is available.

2.question: Will it support text-to-video and image-to-video?
2.answer: The exact feature set will be confirmed once the integration is live.

3.question: How will pricing work?
3.answer: Pricing will be shown on OpenCreator once the model is enabled.

4.question: How do I get notified?
4.answer: Bookmark this page and check back for updates.
